demos.header: In Upper Manhattan, downtown [D] stops at 135 St

demos.header:
In the Bronx, [2] service operates every 16 minutes between E 180 St and Wakefield-241 St
The last stop for alternate trains from Manhattan is E 180 St
demos.description:
Transfer at E 180 St [accessibility icon] to a Wakefield-bound [2] to continue your trip.
What's happening?
We're replacing tracks

demos.header: Elevator outage @ 66 St-Lincoln Center: East side of Broadway (between 65 St & 66 St) to uptown platform [Maintenance]
demos.description: Elevator outage @ 66 St-Lincoln Center: East side of Broadway (between 65 St & 66 St) to uptown platform [Maintenance]

demos.header: In Lower Manhattan and Brooklyn, [Q] runs via the [R] in both directions between Canal St and DeKalb Av
demos.description:
Trains stop at City Hall, Cortlandt St, Rector St, Whitehall St-South Ferry, Court St and Jay St-MetroTech.

Note: At Canal St, [Q] trains stop at the [R] platform during this time.

What's happening?
Structural maintenance

demos.header: St George-bound S48 buses are detoured from Richmond Terrace at Arlington Ave to Arlington Pl at South Ave
demos.description:
Buses will not stop at Richmond Terrace at Arlington Ave and South Ave at Richmond Terrace.

Buses make stops as requested along Arlington Ave.
See map

What's happening?
DOT- road work

Note: Bus arrival information may not be available/accurate while buses are detoured

demos.header: In the Bronx, uptown [2][5] skips Jackson Av, Prospect Av, Intervale Av, Simpson St, Freeman St, 174 St and West Farms Sq-E Tremont Av
demos.description:
For service to these stations, take the [2] or [5] to E 180 St [accessibility icon] and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [2] or [5].

For service from these stations, take the [2] or [5] to 149 St-Grand Concourse and transfer to an uptown [2] or [5].

Travel tip:
For service to Jackson Av, Prospect Av, Intervale Av and Simpson St, transfer to the Bx4 bus at 3 Av-149 St [accessibility icon].

What's happening?
Signal maintenance

[accessibility icon] This service change affects one or more ADA accessible stations and these travel alternatives may not be fully accessible. Please contact 511 to plan your trip.

signature.instructions:
You are a GTFS-Realtime Semantic Compiler for the MTA.

Given a transit alert's header and description, extract the structured
GTFS-RT metadata. 

CRITICAL RULES:
- informed_entities must include ALL affected routes listed in the text.
- NEVER include stops or routes mentioned as alternatives, detours, or 
  recommendations (e.g. "take the B instead", "use stops on X St instead").
- active_periods must be ISO-8601 datetime strings parsed from the text.
- If no specific stops are mentioned, only include the route_id.

fields.description: The short alert headline written by the operator.
The detailed alert body with stop and timing information.
JSON array of InformedEntity objects. Schema: [{"agency_id": str, "route_id": str, "stop_id": str|null}]
JSON array of ActivePeriod objects. Schema: [{"start": "ISO-8601", "end": "ISO-8601"|null}]
